name: H & M Bus Co

name: Voigt's Bus Svc
fmcsa_address: 24243 CO RD 7, Saint Augusta, MN 56301 (mailing: PO Box 1, Saint Cloud, MN 56302)
officers: Voigt family (Norbert and Mercedes Voigt founders; family-owned, 4 generations)
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State / OpenCorporates (VOIGT'S BUS SERVICE, INC., domestic business corporation)
notes: SAFER snapshot for VOIGT'S SCHOOL BUS SERVICES INC (USDOT 881425) has principal address in Saint Augusta MN, not the Waconia (308 S Birch St) address in the input list — Voigt's operates multiple MN facilities (Cold Spring, Minneapolis, St. Augusta, St. Cloud, plus Waconia office) under a family of related entities (Voigt's Bus Service Inc, Voigt's School Bus Services Inc, Voigt's Motorcoach Travel). USDOT 881425 (Voigt's School Bus Services Inc) likely covers the school-bus subsidiary; per company materials, Voigt's operates 100+ buses across all subsidiaries (SAFER snapshot lists 20 power units / 38 drivers under the specific School Bus Services entity). Carrier reported 15 inspections, 3 crashes (0 fatal, 1 injury, 2 tow-aways) over 24 mo. School bus service since 1947-48 school year. MN business corp incorporation date 1960 per OpenCorporates summary (not directly verified due to CAPTCHA).
